data.epi_content:
After three months, the Crown Prince came to my room.

His face was quite haggard, his skin was tanned, and his dark circles extended down to the tip of his nose, making him look like someone who was ill.

Ah, he doesn't seem to be the Crown Prince anymore.

He wasn't wearing the Crown Prince's clothes with red patterns, but the Emperor's clothes adorned with golden patterns.

He looked at me, feigning composure.

"It's been a while."

"Yes, it has been a while."

After exchanging greetings, he approached me and sat cross-legged on the bed beside me.

"Why are you still sane?

I thought you'd be drooling with no sign of consciousness in your eyes.

I guess those Blacks couldn't properly complete the task I assigned them."

Saying that, the Emperor began poking my stomach—the area where my uterus is located—with his finger.

"Should I have made them put a black baby in there?

If I had given them free rein, they would have thrust into you eagerly.

Though they may be stupid, those males have genitals as massive as horses."

"What difference would that make? No matter what they did to me, I wouldn't be affected.

Those filthy beasts couldn't break me no matter what they did. It doesn't bother me at all.

It doesn't bother me at all."

As I said this, I tried to push away the Emperor who was poking my stomach, but he seemed not to be listening to anything I was saying.

He was looking at me while overlapping something else in his mind, continuing his own train of thought.

I said I wouldn't submit, but I was gradually reaching my limit.

Clinging to groundless hope that Evan would save me and looking toward a future that hadn't yet come to pass was a kind of torture.

Being beaten with wooden sticks until my bones broke and having my teeth pulled out by the dirty hands of those Blacks was nothing compared to the agony of still being trapped here.

Perhaps if I had been carrying a beast's child in my womb, I might have torn out my own stomach.

Though I couldn't see any sharp objects, I had learned through beatings that with enough force applied to my hands, I could pierce skin and pull something out.

Yes, after being beaten, my flesh became sunken.

Organs protruded through the gaps.

That black man who seemed to hate me so much devoured some unidentifiable organ right in front of my eyes.

He ate me.

He chewed on my flesh and tore at my organs.

The more I screamed in pain, the more he cackled with delight, pouring filth on me, and somehow I endured it by grinding my teeth until my jaw hurt and shedding tears I couldn't hold back.

I don't know if they've placed some spell in this room, but unlike the soft room, here I recover quickly even if I bash my head against the wall.

If I try to hang myself from the hook on the ceiling, somehow some Blacks find me and throw my struggling body to the floor.

After all, it takes at least six minutes to die by hanging.

Still, the fact that the Crown Prince—no, the Emperor—came to see me might mean that Evan is searching everywhere to rescue me.

Maybe he's not just clinging to Vivian, but actually cares about me and is doing something to save me, to rescue me.

Honestly, it's hard to believe.

Considering how Evan has acted toward me and what he's shown me so far.

But I have no other lifeline to cling to.

If this is just happening in the imagination of a madwoman, it would be truly regrettable, but it can't be.

It can't be.

If it were, what would become of all my efforts to maintain my sanity until now?
data.epi_content2:
It would all become meaningless.

"Anyway, I'm truly delighted that I finally have a use for you.

I was seriously considering handing you over to that accursed black magician, but then I realized I could just use you as bait to kill him.

That black magician might get so aroused at the sight of a one-eyed cripple that he'd come running. I personally detest one-eyed people."

Saying that, he began muttering to himself as if unaware I could hear him.

Half the people living in Strelitz, countless generations, all dead. All because of this useless woman, he said.

"I'll throw you to him. I'll give him whatever he wants!

The Empire is mine anyway, so I can gather my strength and kill him someday.

Before that, I need to teach him a lesson about what happens when someone covets what's mine.

I didn't want to make a roly-poly doll out of someone so pretty, but I suppose it doesn't matter since I won't be using you."

This time, instead of putting a ball in my mouth, he roughly stuffed a white cloth into it and produced a savage-looking axe and something burning in midair.

Then he laid me on the bed and brought down his sword.

As I twisted my entire body and was about to faint from pain with a groan, he suddenly stopped and said:

"Ah, many have died from the pain."

Saying that, he poured a potion into my nostrils.

Then he removed the cloth from my mouth.

I immediately spat.

He dodged it as if he had expected it.

Has he become too accustomed to this?

"You're insane.

I told you, the Empire will end with you.

I'll make it happen. You'll be remembered as a historically terrible ruler.

Ugh, you pathetic bastard, you're filthy and desperate because you couldn't even kill one woman..."

He ripped out my tongue and cauterized it with fire.

Then he stabbed my remaining left eye, blinding me completely.

"Yes. I thought something would change if I took the helm, but perhaps being Emperor wasn't my calling.

I was good at destroying things, but I never thought it would be my own country."

My flailing limbs begin to lose movement.

It must be the effect of the drug.

Eventually, I lose all sensation in my limbs, suggesting he's cut them off, cauterized them, and then used healing magic.

A roly-poly doll, he says.

I wouldn't even be able to get up if I fell over.

Especially with my limbs cut off.

A person who can't even use words properly is the Emperor. Haha!

Rather than screaming in despair and grief, it seems better to take it humorously.

If I were to take what's happening to me seriously in this situation, I might go insane.

"I hope that black magician will come running when he sees this, but I wonder if he'll even recognize you.

Take her to where that cursed heretic is. If we can't catch him, so be it.

This is just a gift full of mockery."

Someone received me as if accepting a bag.

Unlike the Crown Prince—no, Emperor—who held me by my hair, this person carried me quite gentlemanly.

After that, I was transported somewhere like a package being delivered.

Thrown into a cargo hold, I smelled horse manure and ate dust, and though they could have given me decent food, perhaps under the Emperor's orders, they continued to force-feed me something like slop.
data.epi_content3:
Well, I didn't cry.

Because I'm a humorous and cheerful person.

I didn't cry.

Because if I recalled the reality of what happened to me here, I would only feel sad.

I didn't cry.

Even if I wanted to bite my tongue and die, or smash my head against the wall to die, my tongue had long been pulled out, and if I tried to hit my head against the wall, I would be restrained.

I couldn't cry.

Even when I wanted to cry, at some point the tears stopped coming.

I was moved to a place full of the smell of blood and decaying corpses.

There, an unknown person with an excessively loud voice tied me to a pole and began to raise me up.

Fortunately, they had dressed me; it would have been quite cold if I were naked.

"You, cursed-heretic, terrible black-magician!! His Imperial Majesty, the Emperor, has-decreed that he will bestow upon-you the woman you have so-desperately desired!!

Tailored to your terrible-and heretical tastes...!"

Suddenly, there was the sound of an explosion.

At the same time, the person holding the pole I was tied to must have died, because I began to fall to the ground while still tied.

What followed were screams, screams, and wails.

Or pleas, terror, and words of despair.

And soon after came the roar of many people colliding with each other.

I've become quite sensitive to sounds and smells while living as this eyeless, disabled roly-poly doll.

I must have become incredibly sensitive if I can feel the rising smell of blood as countless people kill each other.

Minutes, hours, perhaps a day passed.

I'm hungry. My body smells foul, as if pus is rising from my wounds.

Even if I try to crawl somewhere, I can't see where to go, so I just lie down and wait to wither away.

Meanwhile, the sounds of fighting gradually quieted down, and I began to hear footsteps approaching me.

Though the voice was quite different, I recognized whose it was the moment I heard it.

"Erica."

The man who said this pressed his forehead against mine.

Then he began to drop tears onto my face.

"I know you'll return if you die. Next time, I'll come find you."

I couldn't answer.

I had no tongue.

Nor could I cry.

I don't know, perhaps my tears had already dried up.

"This won't happen again.

You won't experience anything like this again.

I'll protect you."

And with those final words, there was the sound of an explosion.

Simultaneously, I was pouring hot tea into a teacup.

Tears flowed.

I cried madly.

But no sound came out.

The merciless mirror showed an expressionless girl with tears flowing from her eyes.
